name: composite-dispatch emits a routing verdict in the common case (tool not --required, no tool-options) with no unbound-variable crash
command: printf 'resource "aws_security_group" "b" { ingress { cidr_blocks=["0.0.0.0/0"] } }\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file main.tf 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'dispatch file=.* status=(green|red|incomplete)' e.txt && ! grep -q 'unbound variable' e.txt && echo routed-verdict-no-crash 1>&2
